name: DL-10 | Deal creator - Slot editing
description: Tapping on a swap icon should open the configurator menu for that product, instead of opening the menu
descriptionHtml: Tapping on a swap icon should open the configurator menu for that product, instead of opening the menu

testStage.description: Tapping on a swap icon should open the configurator menu for that product, instead of opening the menu

steps.name: Click getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Enter postcode to start your' })
Fill "b18 5ap" getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Enter postcode to start your' })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'badge Priority from O2 Bundle 1 £40.37 £19.99  icon 1x Large Pizza icon 1x' })
Choose item to slot edit
